headline: United Rentals Q2 Earnings Beat on Rental Growth, '26 Guidance Raised
summary: URI beats Q2 estimates as record rental revenues, stronger fleet productivity and specialty demand drive growth and a higher 2026 outlook.

headline: D.R. Horton: Better Execution Now Offsets Weak Demand (Rating Upgrade)
summary: D.R. Horton is upgraded from sell to hold as execution offsets weak demand and valuation concerns. Click here to read an analysis of DHI stock now.
